TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: tiamen a se Payuan tangidangida a vakela a vuluq a kuang na navunavuq a inalang.
S.PHON: tiamən a sə pajuan taŋidaŋida a vakəɭa a vuɭuq a kuaŋ na navunavuq a inaɭaŋ.
S.FORM: tiamen a se Payuan tangidangida a vakela a vuluq a kuang na navunavuq a inalang.
S.PHON: tiamən a sə pajuan taŋidaŋida a vakəɭa a vuɭuq a kuaŋ na navunavuq a inaɭaŋ.
S.TRANSL: Long ago we Paiwans had arrows, spears and guns made of bamboo.

S.FORM: qau nu maqinatsap i tuazua, maqaqetsi tuazua inalang na vunavuq.
S.PHON: qau nu maqinaʦap i tuazua, maqaqəʦi tuazua inaɭaŋ na vunavuq.
S.FORM: qau nu maqinacap i tuazua, maqaqeci tuazua inalang na vunavuq.
S.PHON: qau nu maqinaʦap i tuazua, maqaqəʦi tuazua inaɭaŋ na vunavuq.
S.TRANSL: When we went head-hunting at that time, we fought with weapons made of bamboo.

S.FORM: a vatu kiayan a pusaladj.
S.PHON: a vatu kiajan a pusaɭaɉ.
S.FORM: a vatu kiayan a pusaladj.
S.PHON: a vatu kiajan a pusaɭaɉ.

S.FORM: azua tsautsau a ngadan nu tapaw Paitudjan, ngadan nu tsautsau Vatjuɫayan, aya tangidangida.
S.PHON: azua ʦauʦau a ŋadan nu tapaw paituɉan, ŋadan nu ʦauʦau vacuʎajan, aja taŋidaŋida.
S.FORM: azua caucau a ngadan nu tapaw Paitudjan, ngadan nu caucau Vatjuljayan, aya tangidangida.
S.PHON: azua ʦauʦau a ŋadan nu tapaw paituɉan, ŋadan nu ʦauʦau vaʦuʎajan, aja taŋidaŋida.
S.TRANSL: They say that long ago there was a man from the Paitudjan family whose name was Vatjuɫayan.

S.FORM: namaqaqetsi tua ɫapiɫapi timadju; tapuluq a vatu.
S.PHON: namaqaqəʦi tua ʎapiʎapi timaɉu; tapuɭuq a vatu.
S.FORM: namaqaqeci tua ljapiljapi timadju; tapuluq a vatu.
S.PHON: namaqaqəʦi tua ʎapiʎapi timaɉu; tapuɭuq a vatu.
S.TRANSL: He fought people of nearby villages, and had ten dogs.

S.FORM: azua ɫapiɫapi lima puluq a tsautsau.
S.PHON: azua ʎapiʎapi ɭima puɭuq a ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: azua ljapiljapi lima puluq a caucau.
S.PHON: azua ʎapiʎapi ɭima puɭuq a ʦauʦau.
S.TRANSL: There were 50 people from the other villages;

S.FORM: tjuruvu a matsay; maḍusanga mevaɫut, aya a tjautsikel a kemasi tsuayan.
S.PHON: curuvu a maʦaj; maɖusaŋa məvaʎut, aja a cauʦikəɭ a kəmasi ʦuajan.
S.FORM: tjuruvu a macay; madrusanga mevaljut, aya a tjaucikel a kemasi cuayan.
S.PHON: ʦuruvu a maʦaj; maɖusaŋa məvaʎut, aja a ʦauʦikəɭ a kəmasi ʦuajan.
S.TRANSL: many died and only two survived, according to the old story.

S.FORM: azua ti sa Vatjuɫayan anga nu uḍain a vatu a mapaqaqepu; nu migatsaɫ timadju, isangas a vatu.
S.PHON: azua ti sa vacuʎajan aŋa nu uɖain a vatu a mapaqaqəpu; nu migaʦaʎ timaɉu, isaŋas a vatu.
S.FORM: azua ti sa Vatjuljayan anga nu udrain a vatu a mapaqaqepu; nu migacalj timadju, isangas a vatu.
S.PHON: azua ti sa vaʦuʎajan aŋa nu uɖain a vatu a mapaqaqəpu; nu migaʦaʎ timaɉu, isaŋas a vatu.
S.TRANSL: When Vatjuɫayan called, his dogs gathered; and when he got up to go, the dogs went first.

S.FORM: nu mavilad a qaɫa, avan a vatu a lemaing.
S.PHON: nu maviɭad a qaʎa, avan a vatu a ɭəmaiŋ.
S.FORM: nu mavilad a qalja, avan a vatu a lemaing.
S.PHON: nu maviɭad a qaʎa, avan a vatu a ɭəmaiŋ.
S.TRANSL: If the enemy ran away, it was the dogs which pursued them.

S.FORM: qau ti sa Vatjuɫayan vaik a beniɫung ta lailaingen anga nua vatu nimadju.
S.PHON: qau ti sa vacuʎajan vaik a bəniʎuŋ ta ɭaiɭaiŋən aŋa nua vatu nimaɉu.
S.FORM: qau ti sa Vatjuljayan vaik a beniljung ta lailaingen anga nua vatu nimadju.
S.PHON: qau ti sa vaʦuʎajan vaik a bəniʎuŋ ta ɭaiɭaiŋən aŋa nua vatu nimaɉu.
S.TRANSL: And Vatjuɫayan went and ambushed(?) those who were being pursued by his dogs.

S.FORM: qau azua qaɫa ini anga ka djemalim.
S.PHON: qau azua qaʎa ini aŋa ka ɉəmaɭim.
S.FORM: qau azua qalja ini anga ka djemalim.
S.PHON: qau azua qaʎa ini aŋa ka ɉəmaɭim.
S.TRANSL: So the enemies could not win.

S.FORM: ɫevavaw tua kasiw.
S.PHON: ʎəvavaw tua kasiw.
S.FORM: ljevavaw tua kasiw.
S.PHON: ʎəvavaw tua kasiw.

S.FORM: qau katsen a zuma azua qaɫa.
S.PHON: qau kaʦən a zuma azua qaʎa.
S.FORM: qau kacen a zuma azua qalja.
S.PHON: qau kaʦən a zuma azua qaʎa.
S.TRANSL: But some of the enemies were bitten.

S.FORM: nu ɫevavaw tua kasiw, katsen nua vatu a qapulu nua kasiw.
S.PHON: nu ʎəvavaw tua kasiw, kaʦən nua vatu a qapuɭu nua kasiw.
S.FORM: nu ljevavaw tua kasiw, kacen nua vatu a qapulu nua kasiw.
S.PHON: nu ʎəvavaw tua kasiw, kaʦən nua vatu a qapuɭu nua kasiw.
S.TRANSL: When they climbed trees, the dogs bit the trunks of the trees.

S.FORM: qau inika djemalim a tsautsau.
S.PHON: qau inika ɉəmaɭim a ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: qau inika djemalim a caucau.
S.PHON: qau inika ɉəmaɭim a ʦauʦau.

S.FORM: saka maɫi ti sa Vatjuɫayan a penanapanaq.
S.PHON: saka maʎi ti sa vacuʎajan a pənanapanaq.
S.FORM: saka malji ti sa Vatjuljayan a penanapanaq.
S.PHON: saka maʎi ti sa vaʦuʎajan a pənanapanaq.
S.TRANSL: And Vatjuɫayan was an expert archer.

S.FORM: avanu sika padjavay a matsay nuazua qaɫa, maya a kai a kemasi tsuayan tangidangida.
S.PHON: avanu sika paɉavaj a maʦaj nuazua qaʎa, maja a kai a kəmasi ʦuajan taŋidaŋida.
S.FORM: avanu sika padjavay a macay nuazua qalja, maya a kai a kemasi cuayan tangidangida.
S.PHON: avanu sika paɉavaj a maʦaj nuazua qaʎa, maja a kai a kəmasi ʦuajan taŋidaŋida.
S.TRANSL: That’s why so many of the enemies died, according to the story from long ago in the past.
